---
title: "Appendix"
---

# LLM Generated Site Map

Home  
Resume  
Projects  
Skills  
Contact  

---

# Original Draft

Example LLM Draft:

"I am a motivated MBA student interested in technology and business strategy."

---

# Final Edited Version

"I am an MBA graduate specializing in Artificial Intelligence applications in business with more than 15 years of experience in enterprise voice collaboration technologies."

---

# Revisions Made

• Added real professional experience  
• Added enterprise project examples  
• Replaced generic language with accurate career information
